title: Amazon Basics 2" Flex Nylon Handle Putty Knife

variation_files.prompt: A close-up, angled product shot of the putty knife resting diagonally on a dark, textured concrete-like surface. The blade is positioned toward the upper left, with the handle extending toward the lower right. In the upper left corner, a stack of three rectangular foam or drywall panels is visible, arranged in a staggered, overlapping manner, with the top two panels appearing white and the bottom one showing a light brown core. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating subtle shadows and highlights that emphasize the texture of the surface and the clean lines of the product. The overall composition is minimalistic and industrial, with a focus on the tool and its implied use in construction or finishing work.

The background consists of soft, layered panels in solid peach-pink tones, with one panel slightly elevated behind the pedestal. title: leeda Wrench Double-Ended Wrench Self-tightening wrench Adjustable wrench Universal Wrench All In One Tool Manual adjusting wrench

variation_files.prompt: A close-up product shot of the adjustable wrench resting diagonally on a wooden workbench surface, positioned in front of a black, textured tool case with a carbon-fiber-like pattern on its lid. The tool case features visible latches and a sturdy, industrial design. Surrounding the wrench are scattered metal bolts and nuts, adding context to the mechanical or workshop setting. The lighting is warm and natural, highlighting the texture of the wood and the matte finish of the tools and case. The composition emphasizes the wrench as the central subject, with the background elements providing a realistic, hands-on environment.
